scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: INVITE sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook SIP/2.0 From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+avaya-cm-line=1 Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,INFO,REFER,UPDATE,OPTIONS,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,PRACK Supported: replaces, eventlist, 100rel User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Expires: 30 Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK [last_Via:] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Supported: replaces Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook SIP/2.0 From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+avaya-cm-line=1 Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,INFO,REFER,UPDATE,OPTIONS,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,PRACK Supported: replaces, eventlist, 100rel User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Expires: 30 [field2] Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field3]@[field4] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field3]@[field4] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uas Min-SE: 1200 Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+avaya-cm-line=1 Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,INFO,REFER,UPDATE,OPTIONS,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,PRACK Supported: replaces, eventlist, 100rel User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=sip:[field0]@[local_ip] 53655765 50 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] b=CT:1920 b=AS:1920 b=TIAS:1920000 t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 120 b=TIAS:64000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000/1

ACK sip:[field3]@[field4] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field3]@[field4] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] ACK [last_Via:] Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: replaces User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:[field3]@[field4] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field3]@[field4] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] INVITE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Content-Length: [len] Max-Forwards: 70 Session-Expires: 1200;refresher=uas
Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+avaya-cm-line=1 [field2] Allow: INVITE,CANCEL,BYE,ACK,INFO,REFER,UPDATE,OPTIONS,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,PRACK Supported: replaces User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Type: application/sdp
v=0 o=sip:[field0]@[local_ip] 53655765 50 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] b=CT:1920 b=AS:1920 b=TIAS:1920000 t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 120 b=TIAS:64000 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000/1 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:120 telephone-event/8000/1

ACK sip:[field0]@[field1];avaya-cm-fnu=off-hook SIP/2.0 [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [$c1fnuack] ACK [last_Via:] Max-Forwards: 70 Supported: replaces User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: 0

ACK [next_url] SIP/2.0 [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: [cseq] ACK Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Emulator Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field3]@[field4][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0

BYE [next_url] SIP/2.0 From: sip:[field0]@[field1];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field3]@[field4][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [cseq] BYE Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] [routes] [field2] Max-Forwards: 70 Content-Length: 0
